siteMetadata.title: HuskyDoge
siteMetadata.author: HuskyDoge
introduction:
Hello! Husky here! I'm an MSML student at CMU, working with the [Locus Lab](https://github.com/locuslab). My research focuses on LLM pre-training, particularly model architectures and training algorithms. I am currently interested in: 
 - **Loop Models** - weight-tied architectures and iterative dynamics. 
 - **Scalable Reasoning** - architectures and training methods that improve both reasoning capability and computational efficiency.

Before this, I worked on generative world models with the [VCG Group](https://vcg.seas.harvard.edu/) at Harvard and [Maitrix](https://github.com/maitrix-org) at UCSD, LLM-agent-based dataset curation with the [TRAIS Lab](https://github.com/TRAIS-Lab) at UIUC, and AI interpretability with the [XAI Lab](https://sjtu-xai-lab.github.io/) at SJTU. More details are available on my **[Experience](/experience)** page.

data.title: [Locus Lab](https://zicokolter.com/), CMU
data.description: Studying scalable equilibrium models. Advised by [**Zico Kolter**](https://zicokolter.com/).

data.title: [Institute of Foundation Models](https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/institute-of-foundation-models/posts/?feedView=all)
data.description: Research internship on **Loop Models on Scale**.

data.title: [VCG Group](https://vcg.seas.harvard.edu/), Harvard
data.description: Developed [**Flow Equivariant World Models**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.01075), studying structured dynamics outside the visible field of view. Advised by [**Yilun Du**](https://yilundu.github.io/), [**Fangneng Zhan**](https://fnzhan.com/), and [**Andy Keller**](https://akandykeller.github.io/).

data.title: [Maitrix.org](https://github.com/maitrix-org), UCSD
data.description: Core contributor to [**PAN World Models**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.09057), previously leading the data and game-generation components. Advised by [**Zhiting Hu**](http://zhiting.ucsd.edu/).

data.title: [TRAIS Lab](https://github.com/TRAIS-Lab), UIUC
data.description: Developed [**DCA-Bench**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.07275), a benchmark for evaluating LLM agents on dataset issue detection and dataset curation. Advised by [**Jiaqi W. Ma**](https://jiaqima.github.io/).

data.title: [XAI Lab](https://sjtu-xai-lab.github.io/), SJTU
data.description: Studied AI interpretability and safety through [**generalizable interaction primitives in DNNs**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.16318), using Shapley-value theory. Advised by [**Quanshi Zhang**](http://qszhang.com/).

awards.title: Outstanding Graduate of Shanghai Jiao Tong University
Rui Yuan Hong Shan Scholarship, Shanghai Jiao Tong University (RMB 20,000)
Shao Qiu Scholarship, Shanghai Jiao Tong University (RMB 10,000)
